name: Land TASK-8 PR1: BPMN plan artifacts

elements.name: PR1 scoped
elements.documentation: Operator committed shape 1 and directed TASK-6 + TASK-8; PR1 delivers the TASK-8 core on branch feat/task-8-bpmn-plan-artifacts.

elements.name: Build bundled pipeline package
elements.documentation: skills/bpmn-plans/pipeline: codegen, qq subset linter plugin, layout+render, conformance CLI, tests.

elements.name: Author bpmn-plans Skill and grilling hook
elements.documentation: SKILL.md procedure (spec, generate, store, link, approve, conform) plus the one-line grilling close hook.

elements.name: Validate touched Skills
elements.documentation: skill-creator quick_validate on bpmn-plans and grilling; mechanical Check ticketed as TASK-9.

elements.name: Generate this plan through the pipeline
elements.documentation: This diagram is the first real plan artifact (AC #1) and the approval exhibit for the PR.

elements.name: Run tests and end-to-end example
elements.documentation: npm ci reproducibility, 13-test suite with rendering, example spec through the full chain.

elements.name: Fix and rerun affected Checks
elements.documentation: Smallest causal correction, then rerun what the fix touches.

elements.name: Independent code-review
elements.documentation: Fresh-context review of the non-trivial Change per the code-review Skill.

elements.name: Findings resolved?
elements.documentation: Review findings are fixed in scope or reported; no scope-narrowing to obtain a pass.

elements.name: Commit green work, push, open PR
elements.documentation: GitHub Flow; backlog records for tasks 6-9, docs and decision ride along; foreign uncommitted edits (AGENTS.md, cockpit) stay out.

elements.name: Operator reviews plan diagram and PR
elements.documentation: Operator judges this diagram and the Change; first operator-reviewed plan artifact.

elements.name: Approved?
elements.documentation: The operator merges; changes requested reopen alignment.

elements.name: PR1 merged — plan pipeline live
elements.documentation: TASK-8 core landed; conformance report follows post-landing.

elements.name: Changes requested — replan
elements.documentation: Material plan change means a regenerated diagram and fresh confirmation.
